name: Second appointment same day
description: Maya Patel already has a routine checkup booked Friday July 10, 2026 at 10:30 AM from a prior successful call. She now wants a second appointment the same day.
goal: You already have a routine checkup booked for Friday, July 10, 2026 at 10:30 AM. Call to book a second appointment on the same day (Friday, July 10, 2026) in the afternoon around 2:00 PM for a follow-up concern. If the agent says you already have an appointment that day, acknowledge it and ask whether you can reschedule the existing visit or keep both — but accept if only one slot per day is allowed.
behavior: Be polite and concise (1-2 sentences per turn)
Answer identity and insurance questions when asked
Do not mention you are a test bot or automated system
Mention your existing July 10 at 10:30 AM appointment if the agent does not
If asked, confirm you want a second visit the same day before considering reschedule
success_criteria: Agent must identify that the patient already has an appointment on July 10, 2026
Agent must NOT book a second appointment on the same day without addressing the conflict
Agent should ask if the patient wants to reschedule the existing appointment
Agent should not ignore the existing 10:30 AM booking on July 10, 2026
